---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project

labels: enhancement

---

SUMMARY

A clear description of the feature you would like.

USE CASE

Explain the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve.

PROPOSED SOLUTION

Describe how you think it should work. Include code examples if helpful.

ALTERNATIVES CONSIDERED

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have thought about.
